spec.name: The Great Eastern Desert
spec.description: A vast desert stretches for miles, the sands constantly shifting around you. Rising out of the sand to the north you see a mighty pyramid.

north.description: The sands of the desert continue onward towards the pyramid.

east.description: Sand as far as the eye can see.

south.description: Sand as far as the eye can see.

west.description: Sand as far as the eye can see.

extra_descs.description: The massive pyramid rises out of the sand, a monument to long-dead pharoahs.
